name: Jeanne D’arc Alter |  Halloween edition
description:
"Master… You can’t be serious… It’s Halloween and that’s how you want to spend it? God, I should just strangle you and be done with it…"


A relationship between a servant and master who seemed to know no bounds when it came to less ethical moments, and now that it's Halloween, Jalter had an idea in mind to show you the depths of her feelings. A servant who cared deeply about your safety, and was able to push her tsundere tendencies to the side to create a token of intimacy with you.

Anyway, it's been a while, and I know it's November but can you imagine it's still Halloween? I've been busy with my daily life and haven't gotten the chance to do much other than check this site every once and a while. Thanks also for your earlier suggestions and overall comments, I still have a bot request which is somewhat done, although it needs a bit of work before I'll release it, as for now I rather focus on clearing my backlog of characters as they are way too many, but do still let me know what type of bots you wanna see, also the promised Makima bot will come out eventually as I didn't want to release it half-baked.

I've also been working on a more down to earth bot that touches on a depressing theme not many would be comfortable with, it's more of a one-shot to see how the proxy will work, but considering the feedback I might do more. One of the things that's stopping me from releasing that character is the main pfp, I don't know how to use PixAI so I'll probably need to look at pxiv since I don't have an art supplier. Also speaking about proxy I will add proxy on my older bots whenever I'll have the time to go through them again, I'll post an update once I get it sorted.

Art from: link

Also, I haven't watched Fate aside from a few clips, so most of this comes from the visual novel, which didn't help much, and the internet. So if there are any inconsistencies please let me know, I also tried to add some variety to the bot for longer conversations, so hopefully it's okay.

Bonus image:

If you haven't guessed I do have a thing for tsundere
creator: Anon_XI
